programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La llegada de Matheus cambia la dinámica en la casa y las mujeres deliran por el nuevo Shore, pero los hombres no se quedan atrás ya que una bomba argentina los sorprende al llegar junto a Nacha.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Nacha muestra interés por Matheus y Diego explota de celos, aunque la pelea menos pensada se da entre dos mujeres fuertes y el asunto escala en segundos. Se acerca otro juicio en la casa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Jacky es expulsada de la casa y Fernanda decide irse con ella. Chile y Isa se entregan al poliamor y Diana teme sufrir represalias. Los Shores se relajan en la playa pero las insolencias de Diego fastidian a todos.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Aunque las vacaciones ya están por terminarse, el ritmo nunca decae en Acapulco y el Boss tiene sorpresas de despedida para los Shores: Tragos en yate y una fiesta final que promete ser inolvidable.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Ultimo día en Acapulco y los Shores prometen llevar la fiesta a otro nivel. Jacky y Fernanda no quieren quedarse afuera y tienen varias sorpresas preparadas para sus compañeros. Será una fiesta final épica.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Con el inicio de las vacaciones, los shores se juntan para dar la bienvenida a los nuevos miembros de la familia. Alba se encuentra cara a cara con Diego y Karime, mientras que Chile toma la decisión de hacer justicia con el ladrón de sus frases.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta en la casa continua y la discusión entre Chile y Diego tiene un desenlace inesperado. Isa toma una decisión que lamentará y un nuevo integrante se une a la familia shore aunque su bienvenida no será la mejor.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La paz y la armonía reinan, y el jefe visita al grupo. Fernanda aparece, pero ignora a "Matryoshka". Carlos vive cinco minutos inolvidables, mientras Karime organiza una cita romántica que podría salir mal.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La cita de Karime y Fernanda da un giro inesperado, y el grupo se dirige a una fiesta. Un visitante causa sensación, y Jacky lo invita a la casa, pero los chicos se sienten incómodos y quieren sacarlo.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Rocío se une al grupo con ganas de venganza. Santiago y Alba sorprenden a todos con una ceremonia poliamorosa. Diego no puede controlar su bebida y su forma de festejar le pasa factura.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta sigue, pero Diego toma una decisión sorprendente. Jaylín se une al grupo y, mientras su bienvenida se descontrola, Karime organiza la primera iniciación en la casa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La iniciación de Alba concluye con éxito, pero Jacky aprovecha a Altafulla para incomodarla. Una nueva invitada llega a la casa y Carlos queda cautivado por su encanto, mientras que José y Beni se enfrentan por la atención de Karime.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los conflictos entre Alba y Altafulla se intensifican. Chile y Beni compiten por llevar a una invitada al despacho. Jacky, tras pasarse de copas, toma una decisión que transformará su relación con Altafulla.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Jacky confronta a todos en la casa para exigir la expulsión de Altafulla. Karime organiza una cita muy mexicana con la intención de espantar a José. Un invitado sorprende a todos, especialmente a Chile y Karime.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore: Antonio Leaves
programme.desc: Due to problems with his family in Mexico, Tony decides to leave the house. When Tadeo realizes there is a free room, he changes his schedule and announces to the group that he will be staying for the rest of the vacation.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore: The Letters
programme.desc: Mane and Jawy's relationship is hanging by a thread. Despite their love, they will say things to each other that are difficult to forgive.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore: Caguamero Banquet
programme.desc: Letters, pacts, galas, punches and other things don't let the group realize the obvious, the vacation is ending.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore: What I Leave and What I Take
programme.desc: The vacation has come to an end and the Shores say goodbye without knowing if they will ever be together again, but they're sure that they had an unforgettable vacation.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The holidays begin and on the first day in the Shore house, old and new members meet to start a holiday of madness. The return to the original house seems to have an effect on its inhabitants and new romances.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: After a wild first night, the Shore house decides to spend a quiet afternoon on the beach where they take the opportunity to talk about what happened the previous night and get to know each other better.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The new "Boss" arrives at the house and the Shores discover that their duties are not at all similar to what they expected. After a day of work, there's nothing better than a few drinks and what seemed like a quiet party, ends in a crazy night.

programme.title: Madre Luna

programme.title: Madre Luna

programme.title: Madre Luna

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Aurora cree que su venganza empieza provocando a Lorenzo y a Martín, despertando celos en ambos. Pero el secuestro de Blanca aviva en ella una sensibilidad que finalmente rompe su entereza. Inés se desmaya y Martín oye cuando llama hija a Aurora.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: Julia at Home

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen provides foolproof recipes for two classic pasta sauces: puttanesca and Bolognese.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pasta with garlic and oil is perhaps the most famous quick pasta dish. It starts with ingredients on hand—garlic, good olive oil, hot red pepper flakes—and turns them into something special and uncommonly good.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We uncover the secrets to beef Burgundy at its best—and also show you a way to make portions of it ahead of time.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our sour cream coffee cake and light, flavorful fruit salads transform weekend brunch into an indulgent meal you'll want to make even when company isn't coming over. A few tips on great coffee round out the perfect start to a day.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The appeal of such quick bread as cinnamon buns and banana bread is clear. Supermarket cinnamon buns often have an odd, artificial flavor and sponge-like texture. And banana bread doesn't need to taste like over-the-hill bananas.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Lemon meringue pie is a three-part recipe—crust, lemon filling, and meringue—and each one can be a challenge. We discover which rolling pins are best and whether you can use store-bought pie crust in a pinch. Then we perfect the filling and meringue.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A severe case of Munchausen syndrome by proxy leads to murder. Gypsy Rose Blanchard decided that killing her own mother was her only way to escape years of abuse. She reveals her story to Dr. Phil in an exclusive interview.Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues dialogue with Amanda who says she was sexually abused by her father, Earl Nix. Hear what Earl said to Amanda during a police-recorded phone call, which the jury heard. Amanda agrees to take a polygraph. Will the results convince? Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: With Nancy Grace, children's rights attorney Paul Mones & criminologist Dr. Denise Boots, Dr. Phil delves into the headlines: a starved & beaten teen escaping his torturers, an 8-year-old boy arrested for killing his father & two reporters found dead.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Santa Claus is coming to town--but so are obnoxious relatives, gifts you have no use for, and drunken co-workers. Dr. Phil, along with etiquette expert Peggy Post, have answers for handling uncomfortable situations at end-of-year festivities.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Autumn says she was called a “crazy, jealous girlfriend” after video of her keying her ex-boyfriend’s car went viral. She says ex-boyfriend, D’Andre, choked her, head-butted her and sexually assaulted her; D’Andre denies sexually assaulting her. Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Ex-spouses Pam & Jim say they've spent $1 million combined in a custody battle for Dawn, 9, a fight that includes multiple arrests, restraining orders & accusations of abuse & molestation. Can the parents stop finger-pointing & mud-slinging?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Suzanne wrote Dr. Phil about her tumultuous relationship with her younger boyfriend. Ryan was first online friends with Suzanne’s twin sister, Michelle, who passed away, but left items to Ryan in her will, of which Suzanne is named executor. Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tammy & Mark say they haven't spoken to their son, Cory, in a year as his wife, Katrina, is literally-- a witch! Katrina, a self-proclaimed "witch," says her inlaw's judge. Cory denies his wife controls him & he's against the poor treatment of his wife.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with D’Andre who claims his abusive relationship with his girlfriend, Autumn, is partly due to what he calls her “messed up” upbringing. Hear what D’Andre says about violating the restraining order that Autumn has against him. Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Do you know someone whose private persona is dramatically different from the face he or she shows to the world? Dr. Phil's guests say their mates lead a double life, and it's wreaking havoc on their relationships.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In one of the most bizarre love stories to come across Dr. Phil’s stage, now Dr. Phil uncovers a massive secret that changes everything with Ryan and Suzanne. Here is the conclusion to a fascinating tale of lies, deception and emotional extortion! Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Danielle and Nick insist they were great parents, saying Danielle’s sister, Kimberly, “kidnapped” their child. Kimberly says these parents are drug addicts. Dr. Phil is their chance to bring their child home despite currently living in a homeless shelter.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.desc: The boys are introduced to Cynthia's new boyfriend Cassius. Stylax plays a prank on Aurelius.

programme.title: Mr. Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean loses his trousers again, in the LAUNDERETTE this time! He has his first round of CRAZY GOLF in the afternoon, but Mr. Bean decides what you need to be any good at the game is a good atlas, a compass and plenty of bus money.

programme.title: Mr. Bean
programme.desc: At the HOSPITAL, Mr. Bean runs out of patience in the Out Patients but has a marvellous time at Windsor Castle with a sentry belonging to Her Majesty. Later, he suffers from a bit of INSOMNIA, but it brings out one of his best animal impersonations.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: The crew goes on a journey of personal discovery when their generators fail.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Lister is missing Rimmer, at least until Kryten steps in to help.

programme.title: The IT Crowd
programme.desc: When a bad bra causes Jen to lose concentration in a board meeting, Moss invents a bra that will never, ever go bad.

programme.title: The IT Crowd
programme.desc: Douglas hires Jen as his new PA, giving Moss and Roy free reign in the office. How will they cope without her?

programme.title: The IT Crowd
programme.desc: While boss Douglas does his best to run Reynholm industries into the ground, Jen has to deal with a builder from hell, Roy loses 20 quid, and Moss learns how to stand up to ruffians.

programme.title: Monty Python's Flying Circus
programme.desc: An offbeat look at the Spanish Inquisition; an unconventional version of "Wuthering Heights." Also: a jury plays charades while delivering its verdict; a man attempts to find one nontaxable pleasure.

programme.title: Monty Python's Flying Circus
programme.desc: Sketches include: Flying Lessons, Hijacked Plane, Psychiatrist Milkman, Complaints, Déjà vu.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Word is getting out in the village about the doctor's 'little problem' with blood. When Peter Cronk is hurt, concern about him brings Martin and Louisa closer together.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa's old flame, Danny Steel, comes to Portwenn hoping to rekindle their romance. He is furious with Martin for interfering with his mother's move to a nursing home.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: When his mother has to go to hospital, Peter Cronk needs a place to stay. The doctor isn't too keen, but Louise is busy with her candidature for headmistress.

programme.title: The Grand
programme.desc: Edward Lawrence comes to The Grand to find Esmee: forty years ago, they were deeply in love but were forced to part; he's now a wealthy widower and wants to marry her.

programme.title: The Grand
programme.desc: Esmee interviews girls for the club. Many pay protection to Scott, a vicious pimp who, to put her off, smashes up Esmee's room, injuring Kate.

programme.title: The Grand
programme.desc: Stephen continues to see Kate, causing some staff resentment, especially when Marcus makes her assistant housekeeper.

programme.title: The Grand
programme.desc: Mrs. Harvey moves into The Grand to solve her money problems and discovers who Edith really is.

programme.title: Peak Practice
programme.desc: Will and Kate face their biggest test yet when Kate is hit by a patient. Meanwhile, Andrew and Erica make a big mistake when she tries to help him come to terms with Kirsty's departure.

programme.title: Peak Practice
programme.desc: Andrew's depression worsens when he is accused of assaulting a patient. Meanwhile, Will tries to convince Kate to move in with him.

programme.title: Peak Practice
programme.desc: Will and Kate are knocked sideways when Kate finds out she is pregnant. Both are torn over whether this is the right time for them to be having a child.

programme.title: Peak Practice
programme.desc: Will and Erica are stood up on the morning they are meant to sign their partnership agreement. Andrew returns to Cardale, but have his shoes been filled by Will's friend David?

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: An old friend of Aunt Joan's turns up, stirring up old memories. In the meanwhile, both Doc Martin and Elaine are struggling with other people's affections.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: En el estreno de la octava temporada, con Paloma Reynosa aún suelta, Gibbs debe tomar medidas desesperadas para proteger a sus seres queridos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El secuestro de una niña se convierte en algo más grande cuando su abuelo complica la investigación.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando los motivos de un atentado contra una técnica de explosivos la relacionan con un asesinato, el equipo del NCIS investiga su muy reservada vida personal.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando el cadáver de un oficial estadounidense se relaciona con un buque de la Marina británica, el asesinato se convierte en un incidente internacional.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Poder absoluto
programme.desc: Danny y Báez investigan a un posible asesino en serie que le envía un mensaje escalofriante a Danny, y Erin juega con la idea de postularse para el puesto de juez.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La historia perfecta
programme.desc: Cuando el reportero Lorenzo Colt (Zachary Booth) es atacado mientras llevaba equipo de la policía de Nueva York en un paseo junto con Jamie y Eddie, Frank pone a Danny y Baez a la caza del tirador que puede estar buscando a otros miembros de la fuerza.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El peor de los escenarios
programme.desc: Frank se pone en alerta máxima cuando una amenaza a la ciudad de Nueva York puede ser inminente luego de un ataque terrorista en el Medio Oriente.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Con amigos como estos
programme.desc: El intento de Erin de condenar a un escurridizo jefe de la mafia por un antiguo asesinato se complica cuando su ex informante, Vincent (Dan Hedaya), deja la protección de testigos para proporcionarle una coartada a su antiguo jefe.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC viaja a Los Ángeles en búsqueda de un sospechoso que secuestra niñeras y niños que cuidan el mismo día cada año.

programme.title: Mentes criminales

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The pressures of the game are getting to some of the contestants and a wild night out causes tempers to flare. This week's challenge proves to be too much for two of the players to handle.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Tensions boil over as a relationship continues to create friction in the house. The rednecks must prove they have brains as well as brawn as the latest challenge puts them to the test.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Down to the final 4 teams, the remaining rednecks plot to take out whoever stands in their way of making it to the end. At the challenge, the players put it all on the line as they overcome any obstacles standing in their way.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Having survived the competition so far, the day they've all been waiting for arrives as the final three teams battle it out in an epic race of strength, intelligence, and endurance.

programme.title: Bachelorette Weekend
programme.desc: The staff is skeptical of Robbie's new incentive program, Nicole plots revenge on JJ after he flakes on work, and a drunk bridesmaid wanders away from the party.

programme.title: Bachelorette Weekend
programme.desc: When a couple heads to Nashville for a joint bachelor-bachelorette party, the staff is put in charge of choosing a best man and juggling both the bride and groom's needs.

programme.title: Bachelorette Weekend
programme.desc: The staff pulls out all the stops for a patriotic party, Robbie confides in JJ that the company is in debt, and Liz and Rosa ignite a prank war.

programme.title: Bachelorette Weekend
programme.desc: Lack of communication leads to a waste of time and money and Robbie breaks out the Fun Bus when a limo scheduling mishap derails plans for a party of Broadway performers.

programme.title: Bachelorette Weekend
programme.desc: The crew scrambles to find a last-minute party after a cancellation, leading to a weekend of juice cleanses, Botox, an angry policeman and a surprising reveal from Robbie.

programme.title: Bachelorette Weekend
programme.desc: California yogis arrive for an adventure-filled weekend, a mistake by Rosa pushes Rachal over the edge, and the Bach Weekend crew tries to lift Rachal's spirits.

programme.title: Bachelorette Weekend
programme.desc: Birthday diva Liz forces the office to go all out, Rachal makes a painful decision, and Robbie pursues a new investor as the company plans a multiparty ultimate weekend.

programme.title: Bachelorette Weekend
programme.desc: Liz fears for her job after she overhears Robbie talking to an investor, and the crew plans a competitive bachelor party for a former magician and his groomsmen.

programme.title: Bachelorette Weekend
programme.desc: Robbie knows something is going on as Liz secretly searches for a new job, the team hosts a bachelorette party from California, and Nicole has a secret admirer.

programme.title: Bachelorette Weekend
programme.desc: While preparing for the final party of the season, Liz's resignation means more work for everyone else, Robbie tries to secure an investor, and Nicole sticks up for Liz.

programme.title: How It Really Happened
programme.desc: Aired 11/5/2017. May 2001 in Washington DC, 24 year old intern Chandra Levy vanishes into thin air. Police find her keys and her cell phone in her apartment and no sign of a struggle. Who saw her last? Where did she go?

programme.title: How It Really Happened
programme.desc: Aired 11/12/2017. An eight-month-old baby is fatally injured while in the care of his au pair (nanny), Louise Woodward. Was it child abuse or a tragic accident?

programme.title: How It Really Happened
programme.desc: Aired 10/15/2017. In 2008, two-year-old Florida toddler, Caylee Anthony, vanishes. Her mother, Casey Anthony tells investigators Caylee has been kidnapped by her nanny, a woman Casey's family has never actually seen. But why? And where was Caylee?

programme.title: How It Really Happened
programme.desc: Aired 10/15/2017. In 2008, two-year-old Florida toddler, Caylee Anthony, vanishes. Her mother, Casey Anthony tells investigators Caylee has been kidnapped by her nanny, a woman Casey's family has never actually seen. But why? And where was Caylee?

programme.title: How It Really Happened

programme.title: How It Really Happened
programme.desc: Aired 10/22/2017. Celebrity designer Gianni Versace was gunned down in broad daylight on the steps of his Miami Beach mansion. Those closest to Versace and his killer Andrew Cunanan, try to unravel the mystery.

programme.title: How It Really Happened
programme.desc: Aired 11/5/2017. May 2001 in Washington DC, 24 year old intern Chandra Levy vanishes into thin air. Police find her keys and her cell phone in her apartment and no sign of a struggle. Who saw her last? Where did she go?

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers capture a suspected burglar, a felon, and his girlfriend are taken into custody after a standoff with police, and a man is arrested for possession of a stolen moped.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young woman claims not to know her passengers, the search of a man's car leads to more charges, and a woman learns not to start vehicles with a screwdriver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man and woman are pulled over while out on a candy run. A simple traffic violation turns into a multi-vehicle police pursuit. Deputies are notified of a stolen car and find the driver in possession of an interesting tool.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: 51 kilos of cocaine are found on a semi-truck during a traffic stop. A man on a bike tosses meth and weed as he flees into the woods. A woman uses a fire extinguisher to damage her girlfriend's door.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man's addiction forces his family to call the police for help, a driver abandons his car and tries to evade officers on foot, and a man tries to conceal his illegal stash.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An open container and crack pipe are discovered inside a teen's vehicle. Officers find a man at a nearby residence lifting weights after trying to evade police. A fight involving two men and a shovel is broken up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect collides with another driver while fleeing from police, deputies mediate an altercation over a bag of chips, and officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two cousins fight over a five dollar debt. Police arrest a man for domestic violence. A taxi cab driver is robbed and shot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man resisting arrest sics his dogs on the police, and a recovering addict about to take his first hit in years wanders into the path of police in pursuit of another suspect.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An ATV driver leads deputies on a wild chase, a woman tries to ditch a bag of hard drugs, and an assault suspect is caught off guard by an incriminating voicemail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer poses as a prostitute in an attempt to attract interested “johns”. A suspect flees on foot through the woods following an assault. An officer decides to check out a local bar where a lot of illegal activity takes place.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect has a change of heart after he leads police on a pursuit. An Officer discovers sterile syringes and rocks in a suspicious man's pocket after he is stopped and searched. A woman is arrested for stealing C.D's out of a car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a notorious New Jersey drug hotbed. Officers find a suspect hidden under a mattress. A bicycle thief is caught red handed.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A distinctive tattoo reveals a wanted felon’s true identity. Deputies talk to a young woman who traded one bad habit for another. A man in possession of a stolen vehicle tells officers how his day went from bad to worse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A repeat offender takes the police on a bumpy ride, a deputy finds paraphernalia in a teen's car, and a woman learns of her brother's drug habit during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A DUI suspect with a suspended license claims he’s not drunk. Officers track an armed robber. An armed and dangerous suspect hides from officers in an apartment complex.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two suspects lead Officers on a high speed pursuit. An Officer discovers two men have warrants after a traffic stop. A man hides from the police after a domesitc disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call reporting an officer involved in a fight. A brazen female driver careens into a ditch after failing to yield. A berserk woman is pulled over for her erratic driving, she is eventually handcuffed but not without a fight.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a mental health crisis, a man runs from police when approached, and officers recognize a burglary suspect as someone they've tangled with before.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Numerous patrol cars give chase to a man on a dirt bike refusing to yield, and an alleged armed robber is upfront about his reasons for running from police when approached.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A DUI suspect attempts to flee from police, officers find a wanted man trespassing in someone's yard, and officers stop two people suspected of stealing a moped.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: During a traffic stop, a driver drops off his passenger before speeding away. Deputies are amazed when a man offers them an ID that looks nothing like him. Deputies investigate a case of road rage involving a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A desperate driver attempts to flee on foot. Officers investigate a complaint in front of a local convenience store. Officers coordinate a sting designed to apprehend suspects who patronize prostitutes.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer on street patrol chases down a suspect on foot, an alleged car thief posts his exploits on Facebook, and a crashed stolen car may not have been stolen after all.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist fleeing police slams into a pickup truck at high speed, and a man being frisked invents an interesting story to explain the suspicious bulge in his pants.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop becomes dangerous when the suspect takes off on the interstate. Officers find a large bag of drugs in a man’s pants. Officers respond to a dispute at a familiar location.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young girl may be the victim of a sexual assault. An officer spots a speeding motorcycle and attempts a routine stop. Officers serve a violation of domestic violence warrant on an inebriated guest at a local hotel.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A body is found in a pottery store in what's apparently a robbery that was interrupted.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A couple leaving a restaurant on their anniversary are killed in the street and their car is stolen. The crime scene is compromised when it rains shortly after the CSIs arrive.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The entire team investigates the abduction of the infant child of a well-to-do family. Suspicion immediately falls on the child's parents.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Two teenage girls run over a deaf man with their car, but they didn't kill him - he was already dead.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Nick, and Warrick take the case of a jogger who was killed by a wild animal in the park. It gets complicated when they discover that the jogger had his liver removed after he was killed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: On the day Grissom has to evaluate his team, a head is found in the trunk of a car. While Gil and Catherine work on the head, Sara and Nick investigate a body in the desert that's missing its head.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The team is investigating the ongoing murders by a signature killer. The killer has some knowledge of forensics and has left little evidence behind.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and crew are called in after high roller Tony Braun, a known drug addict, is found dead in his house by a gardener.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The entire CSI team investigates a disappearance at a local university.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom investigates a possible suicide at a high-profile construction site.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the class clown at the local high school is found murdered, the CSI team is called to investigate.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara and Warrick are called in to investigate an abandoned, blood-splattered apartment and Nick and Catherine must examine a dead scuba diver lodged in a tree.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate a murder suspect who is caught red-handed, burying the victims, while Catherine and Warrick take on the case of a woman found dead in a hotel spa.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Nick investigate the death of a book restorer, while Catherine and Sara are called to the scene of a fatal train crash.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo investiga los continuos asesinatos cometidos por un asesino de firma. El asesino tiene ciertos conocimientos forenses y ha dejado pocas pruebas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo son llamados después de que Tony Braun, un conocido drogadicto, es encontrado muerto en su casa por un jardinero.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Todo el equipo de CSI investiga una desaparición en una universidad local.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom investiga un posible suicidio en una obra de gran envergadura.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el payaso de la clase del instituto local aparece asesinado, se llama al equipo de CSI para que investigue.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara y Warrick son llamados para investigar un apartamento abandonado salpicado de sangre y Nick y Catherine deben examinar a un submarinista muerto alojado en un árbol.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan a un sospechoso de asesinato al que pillan in fraganti enterrando a las víctimas, mientras Catherine y Warrick se encargan del caso de una mujer encontrada muerta en el spa de un hotel.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y Nick investigan la muerte de un restaurador de libros mientras Catherine y Sara son llamadas al lugar de un accidente de tren mortal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y Catherine investigan la aparente muerte violenta de una mujer encontrada en un arenero. Su investigación les lleva al mundo clandestino de los clubes de s y m.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan un atraco a un casino durante el cual se disparó a víctimas inocentes, mientras que Catherine y Sara son llamadas a la escena de un asesinato en un lugar remoto del desierto.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick se pone al mando por primera vez cuando el equipo investiga el asesinato del estafador, que ha huido con el dinero de unos turistas sólo para ser tiroteado y asesinado en el aparcamiento.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI es llamado cuando un famoso empresario inmobiliario aparece muerto en el ascensor de un hotel.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y Sara son llamados a la escena del crimen cuando dos víctimas de asesinato aparecen ocultas en las tuberías de una obra en construcción en medio de un campo de alfalfa, mientras Catherine y Nick investigan un ostensible accidente de caza.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La némesis de Grissom, el asesino en serie Paul Millander, reaparece y se cobra una tercera víctima en este apasionante episodio.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami’s club scene turns deadly when underage drinking sparks a bloody murder in a bathroom stall, Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A jury field trip to the scene of a murder flips the legal tables when the defendant ends up dead and the twelve jurors become the prime suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A “Speed Dating” night for Miami singles turns deadly for one South Beach stud who finds himself on the wrong end of a tire iron.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami Beach is evacuated for a tsunami, but the CSI team remains after discovering a bank robbery plot while investigating a seemingly random murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A string of dead bodies, found off the coast of Miami, turns out to be the work of modern-day pirates. Horatio and the team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An innocent man is killed when someone falls on him from a balcony. The CSI team is lead into the center of a high-level sex and murder scandal.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A seemingly random carjacking turns out to be anything but when a young woman's gambling addiction becomes more than the family business can support.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A hospital emergency room shootout investigation puts the CSI team in the middle of a murder case involving the leader of a prominent street gang

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A routine traffic stop ends in the murder of a patrolman. The CSI team must sort out a young girl's obsessive love affair in order to find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A "Friction Party" at a private suite in one of the city's hotels accommodating hundreds of cruise passengers leaves a young woman dead.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio faces a former nemesis who escaped his grasp once before, a case of stolen identity leads to murder, the question becomes "which one did it?"

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Florida's gator and snake-infested Everglades becomes ground zero for a number of unrelated murders just as fires engulf the rare eco-system.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Florida's gator and snake-infested Everglades becomes ground zero for a number of unrelated murders just as fires engulf the rare eco-system.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a small jet crashes into a residential neighborhood, the wreckage reveals a corpse in the cargo hold, along with a half-million dollars in cash.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y Delko deben viajar a la brillante y soleada Los Ángeles cuando un secreto del pasado de Jesse quizá permita que un asesino quede libre.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI desentrañan el complicado misterio de un asesinato en un lugar de trabajo cuando encuentran a una odiada recepcionista asesinada en la hermosa Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo de Horatio Caine, Kyle, regresa de la guerra, busca la ayuda de su padre y del equipo de CSI para resolver un inquietante asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Las vacaciones de primavera elevan la cantidad de muertos en Miami cuando Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI se separan para resolver tres asesinatos diferentes.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El espíritu de una víctima no dejará a Calleigh en paz hasta que ella haga justicia por su asesinato. Debe contar con la ayuda de Horatio y el resto del equipo de CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un robo de joyas aparentemente perfecto termina en asesinato y, cuando se roban pruebas del lugar del crimen del laboratorio, Delko regresa para encontrar al culpable.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a una madre suburbana, el equipo de CSI descubre el oscuro pasado de su familia, mientras Delko continúa con su misión encubierta.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando la exnovia de Horatio Caine muere en una explosión, el equipo busca dentro de su propio departamento para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un asesino en serie se burla del equipo de CSI dejándole pistas crípticas y cuanto más tarden en decodificar estos acertijos, mayor será la cantidad de muertos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI sufre la trágica pérdida de uno de los suyos cuando un genio psicótico se descontrola en la hermosa Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a una camarera en un club exclusivo, Horatio debe buscar en la lista de invitados más elitista de Miami para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Secuestran a una niña y el único testigo que tiene el equipo de CSI es un hombre ciego que oyó el secuestro, lo que lleva a Horatio a un viejo archienemigo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el asesino de la esposa de Horatio se fuga de la cárcel y causa disturbios, deben determinar qué es lo que busca y encontrarlo antes de que vuelva a atacar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a una estrella de telerrealidad, el equipo de CSI investiga al elenco, a los admiradores obsesionados y el pasado oculto de las estrellas para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: Mañana es hoy

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro

programme.desc: The BAU investigates victims who were documenting their personal lives and inner desires on blog posts and social media. Also, Kevin gets jealous when he learns Garcia may have a new love interest.

programme.desc: When a time capsule in a small Colorado town is opened 25 years later and contains a gruesome discovery, the BAU investigates that crime and a possible link to the death of a local police officer.

programme.desc: Un estudiante universitario fue encontrado muerto y la evidencia sugirió que conocía a su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Muere un atleta de secundaria, luego de que lo atropellaran y se dieran a la fuga. Todos en el pueblo lamentaron su muerte. Encontrar al asesino era muy poco probable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2006, la agente de bienes raíces de Texas Sarah Anne Walker fue brutalmente asesinada en una casa modelo. Semanas después, se presentó un testigo que pudo haber visto al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1998, una actuación de asesinato misterioso en Maryland se convierte en una verdadera novela policíaca cuando se descubre el cuerpo gravemente quemado de Stephen Hricko en su habitación de hotel.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Manchas delatoras
programme.desc: La policía instituyó una búsqueda intensa cuando la madre de dos niños pequeños desapareció.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En este episodio clásico de Archivos Forenses la serie de crímenes reales más extensa de la historia de la televisión, Eileen y Derrick Severs desaparecen de su casa en un pequeño pueblo de Gran Bretaña y la policía encuentra evidencia de un crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1994, Shannon Melendi, de 19 años, desapareció mientras estaba en la Universidad de Emory. Su desaparición permaneció un misterio durante diez años, hasta que una nueva prueba científica proporcionó una nueva pista sobre Colvin "Butch" Hinton.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Valiree Jackson, de 9 años, desapareció camino a la escuela cerca de Spokane. Su padre, Brad Jackson, denunció la desaparición y toda la comunidad comenzó a buscar a su secuestrador.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los síntomas parecidos a los de la gripe de una madre y sus hijos resultan ser algo más grave: intoxicación por talio. Después de la muerte de la madre, los investigadores centran su atención en encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Edward Honaker fue declarado culpable de violación, sodomía y agresión sexual agraviada y condenado a tres cadenas perpetuas en prisión. El sostuvo su inocencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los investigadores examinan las cenizas de un incendio que mató a una mujer de 40 años. El fuego parecía haber sido iniciado por un cigarrillo desatendido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer desaparecía sin dejar rastro, había dos posibles explicaciones: secuestro o asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encontró a Janice Johnson muerta al pie de las escaleras del sótano. La policía de Nueva Escocia tuvo que desenredar las circunstancias que rodearon la muerte de Janice y responder a la pregunta: ¿Fue un accidente o un asesinato?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Susan Fassett fue abatida a tiros cuando salía de su práctica de coro de la iglesia en Poughkeepsie, Nueva York. Su esposo Jeff se convirtió en el principal sospechoso, hasta que fue absuelto por la policía.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de Leanne Tiernan, de 16 años, fue descubierto nueve meses después de su desaparición. Los científicos forenses encontraron pistas que pintaron un retrato virtual de su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: La coartada
programme.desc: En 1991, una chica de secundaria desaparece después de asistir a una fiesta. El principal sospechoso no tenía a un pero dos testigos que le daban coartada para la noche en que desapareció.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la búsqueda del asesino de dos adolescentes de Texas, un perfil de conducta llevó a sospechar de Jason Massey. La ciencia demostró que el perfil era correcto y Massey fue ejecutado mediante inyección letal el 3 de Abril del 2001.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2008, la universitaria Jenna Verhaalen fue encontrada muerta en su departamento de Bryan, Texas y las hemorragias petequiales en sus ojos indicaron que fue estrangulada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cabecera
programme.desc: Cuando los cazadores encontraron un cráneo en un cañón de Texas, la policía encontró trozos de ropa, huesos pequeños y un mechón de cabello.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Falso testimonio
programme.desc: La muerte de una mujer en Pensilvania desencadena una investigación por homicidio sobre la muerte de otra mujer en Carolina del Norte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En una tarde cálida del verano, en el pueblo de Verona, Wisconsin, se enfrentaba a su primer triple homicidio. Para resolver este caso, los investigadores tuvieron que adentrarse en el mundo de jugadores de alto nivel y apuestas fuera del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: ¿Quién fue el delincuente sexual que asesinó a dos muchachos adolescentes en Nebraska? La clave para detenerlo sería la composición única de la cuerda basura que usó para amarrar a sus víctimas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Rompecabezas de plástico
programme.desc: Un hombre que iba en bicicleta resultó herido de muerte y la policía creía que había sido víctima de un accidente de atropello y fuga.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la década de los 90, los medios llamaron a Richard Rogers el "asesino de la última llamada" porque atacaba a hombres en bares gay que obviamente estaban intoxicados.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2008, el desarrollador inmobiliario de Colorado, Alan Helmick, fue encontrado muerto a tiros en su casa por su esposa Miriam, quien luego se convirtió en la principal sospechosa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2002, una pequeña comunidad en el norte del estado de Nueva York quedó devastada cuando Patty Wlasiuk murió en un accidente de camión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Edward Post preparó un baño para su esposa antes de salir a correr. Regresó y la encontró sin respirar. Murió antes de que llegara la ambulancia. La policía consideró su muerte como accidental hasta que surgió un motivo.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As 51 rookies and veterans arrive to chase their dreams, the candidates hope to prove their talent with a standout solo performance and take on the kick line in the Judges' Showcase.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Melissa Rycroft comes to the first rehearsal to see which newbies have showmanship, DCC alum Natalie Woods hosts a rookie at her home, and Kelli and Judy make the first cuts of the season.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 47 hopefuls learn the mechanics of the kickline, a rookie's injuries put her out of commission, and choreographer Evan Miller teaches a dance routine that calls for power and precision.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With nine cuts looming before the team's first game, the hopefuls show off their freestyle dancing, get fit for their official uniforms and learn new choreography from Denise Dicharry.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Choreographer Criscilla Anderson uses her cancer battle to inspire the dancers, veteran mentors offer style tips to the rookies, and Travis Wall helps Judy and Kelli make their next cut.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The hopefuls practice the highly precise entrance routine and jump kicks for the first time, Jordann shares a vulnerable personal story, and Judy and Kelli make two more tough cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the remaining ladies try out for the media-savvy Show Group, Judy and Kelli are faced with yet another difficult decision, and some dancers rise to glory while others' hearts are broken.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Makeovers give the dancers renewed confidence, alum Yuko shares exciting personal news, veteran Lisa makes a hard decision, and Kelli questions Alora-Rose about a rumored distraction.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Week nine of training camp intensifies when Kelli and Judy confront Alora-Rose and deliberate squad dismissal decisions one week before the first game of the season.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy slyly make the final squad announcement, and the new team faces several obstacles before taking the field for their first game as Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds will audition but only 45 girls will secure a spot in the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders training camp. DCC director Kelli Finglass presides over the process with a keen eye for talent and beauty.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training camp gets underway as the girls are introduced to a grueling schedule of dance rehearsals with choreographer Judy Trammell and fitness instructor Jay Johnson.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Reality sets in and the mental and physical stress of training camp hits the girls hard.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Super Bowl XXX MVP Larry Brown and current Dallas Cowboy Ryan Fowler school the training camp candidates with the ultimate football challenge. The girls are tested on their NFL knowledge and athletic skills on the field.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Beauty is the name of the game as the training camp candidates get major hair makeovers in preparation for their first solo publicity stills. But not everyone is picture perfect and by the end of the week, there will be a heartbreaking elimination.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The end of training camp is just around the corner and after Kelli's annual etiquette luncheon the girls are on their best behavior. A tough new choreographer introduces the girls to real dance technique with devastating results.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates find themselves in front of the camera for a crash course in how to deal with the media. The judges from the open call are brought back to have their final say.

programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Faced with his own aggression and looming mortality, Spinner attempts to prove his ‘masculinity’ by kicking an unnecessary amount of Lakehurst ass.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s moved back home but the honeymoon between she and her parents is just about over. And when her dad insists she have a traditional “Debut” – the lavish party many Filipino girls have for their 18th birthday – Manny takes a stand.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie’s ex-mentor Caitlin Ryan arrives to do a guest lecture series in Jesse’s class and Ellie sees her opportunity to set herself apart from her peers. She throws herself into Caitlin’s class assignment and her hard work quickly pays off.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma decides she’ll do what it takes to get back on track, starting by rekindling her friendship with Manny, but when Manny wants to hit an audition to be a ‘Purple Dragon’ sports drink model, Emma finds herself quickly at odds with her best friend.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner deals with chemo, timing how long he can go between barf-buckets, while his cheerleader Jane, tries to bring the party to him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco and Ellie’s retail therapy goes awry when Marco finds his credit card maxed out. Ellie rescues him this time, but Marco realizes a new job is the real solution—and might even give him the opportunity to meet new people.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Roofie rape victim Darcy is barreling down a self-destructive path and only a handful of people know why.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny and Jay’s faux-mance is working perfectly. But when Jay gets too serious, Manny reminds him it's all fake.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Manny discovers that her University demo reel is actually a sex tape that she and Jay made, her future hangs in the balance. By the time Jay catches up to her with the correct DVD, it's too late.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When cute and funny Rachel joins Peter, Danny & Derek’s MI group for their “How-To” video project, confidence is high.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia’s finally been granted a spot on Spirit Squad, and she’s ecstatic. But trying to be a normal teenager is proving a difficult balancing act.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige is on her A game - she's excelling at work, Andrea's given her a raise, and she’s going to use the money to redesign her bedroom.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Since Snake’s suspension from teaching, Emma’s life has been turned upside-down. He’s really in a funk, and the dark cloud over his head has fouled the air at home, where Emma finds herself caught in the no-man’s-land between her parents.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy finally gets the news he’s been waiting for – he’s been accepted into NYU! But he’s got other things on his mind. He is slowly discovering that he has other options when it comes to his real dream – walking again.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Anya’s first year running the Free The Children Freedom Fast to promote education and health in Africa. She has a lot to coordinate - which would be hard enough without meddling Holly J, who’s determined to make Anya choose between her and Sav.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia’s renewed relationship with Lucas is making her feel like she’s on top of the world. With the extra free time afforded by his help, she's taking on all the high school things her parenting has kept her from enjoying.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s world is rocked when Paige drops a bomb – her dad’s going to help her buy a condo. Ellie’s just learned she might be up for the editorship of the Core newspaper, so she’s distracted.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner and Jimmy have just one more exam before they’re finally done school and, with Jimmy's help, Spinner's sure he can pass and enjoy his cancer-free future.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With time ticking towards the Class of ’07 Prom and Graduation ceremony, Liberty has the perfect night planned: a hotel prom, with the amazing Natasha Bedingfield performing.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Relieved of parental duty for the year by mom, Mia starts the school year off with a bang by bonding with new girl, Leia, and getting scouted to be the new face of football star Tom Blakes’ shoe line.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia does what she can to ensure her success. Besides, Tom is handsome and famous, so Mia thinks being with Tom to get ahead isn’t such a bad trade.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane wants to play football but since there is no girls team, then boys’ football it is. The Shep doesn’t like the idea one bit, but once Jane proves she’s faster, stronger, and more athletic than most of the team, he relents…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Eager to make the most of her college experience, Liberty jumps at the chance to rush the most popular sorority at Smithdale. Determined to get in, Liberty slowly exchanges old habits and old friends (Manny and Emma) for sorority approved ones.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Peter begins a relationship with Mia and a friendship with Riley. Finding a balance between a new girlfriend and a new guy friend gets confusing, especially when Riley is suddenly kissing Peter.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Sav and Anya plan to celebrate their six-month anniversary on the school’s overnight trip. Only problem? Alli, Sav’s sister, convinces their parents to let her go on the trip on the condition that Sav spends every second with her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia’s T-Bombz campaign is hitting the city and Degrassi. But Holly J has bigger and better things going on. She’s prepping the Power Squad for an out-of-town competition, and things are looking good.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner and Jane have plans for next year – she’ll start pre-law and he’ll attend Police College. When he doesn’t get in, he can’t bear to tell her, so he lies.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Bird expert Bill Oddie helps construct amazing, life-sized, bio-mechanical replicas as he presents an imaginary battle between a tyrannosaurus rex and a triceratops.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Here, Bill Oddie asks whether the Velociraptor was really the monstrous predator of popular legend.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: America was once home to such fierce predators as the giant short-faced bear and the saber-toothed tiger.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: In Australia 65,000 years ago, the first human explorers face a land populated with giant lizards, killer rhino-like creatures and deadly birds.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: The Maori struggled for survival 1,000 years ago in a New Zealand populated by giant birds.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the coelophysis and the diplodocus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the opthalmosaurus and the ornithocheirus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the leaellynasaura and the tyrannosaurus.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: For thousands of years, downtown LA hid an indiscriminate killer. In one of the most surprising wildlife crime stories in the world, `Natural World' turns forensic detective to solve the mystery and unmask victims and killers.

programme.title: Land of Giants: A Walking With Dinosaurs Special
programme.desc: Witness the spectacle of the fearsome predator Giganotosaurus.

programme.title: The Giant Claw: A Walking With Dinosaurs Special
programme.desc: Zoologist Nigel Marvin travels back in time on a prehistoric safari.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: The Doctor attempts to persuade Captain Hart of the danger that the Master represents. Eager to make contact with the Sea Devils, the Doctor journey's to the sea bed.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: The Doctor is captured by the Sea Devils and taken to their undersea base. There, he tries to make peace with the creatures, but his efforts are thwarted by the Navy.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: The Sea Devils come to the surface and attack the Naval base. The Doctor is forced to create a machine that will awaken the creatures across the entire world.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Three Doctors
programme.desc: Attacked by an antimatter creature the Doctor sends an SOS to the Time Lords.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Three Doctors
programme.desc: The Doctor and Jo pass through the black hole to the desolate world of antimatter.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Three Doctors
programme.desc: The Doctors are trapped in the universe of antimatter where they confront Omega.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Three Doctors
programme.desc: Omega intends to escape his antimatter world but needs the Doctors to take his place.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Carnival of Monsters
programme.desc: The Doctor is free to roam space and time again, but having planned to visit Metebelis Three, the Doctor and Jo actually find themselves stowaways aboard a ship in the 1920s, heading for Bombay.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Carnival of Monsters
programme.desc: The Doctor and Jo realise that they are actually trapped in a loop on a miniaturised version of Earth in which the other ship passengers endlessly repeat their actions.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Carnival of Monsters
programme.desc: Having escaped from the ship, the Doctor and Jo find themselves stuck inside the workings of a giant machine. Can they find their way out?

programme.title: Doctor Who: Carnival of Monsters
programme.desc: The Doctor is reunited with the TARDIS and now full size, but Jo is still trapped within the machine. When the Doctor meets the operators of the Scope he learms that Jo is in grave danger.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Frontier in Space
programme.desc: The Doctor and Jo land on a spaceship in the far future as it is attacked by Ogrons, which the human crew see as Draconians. The Doctor and Jo are taken to Earth as spies.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Frontier in Space
programme.desc: Neither the humans nor the Draconians are willing to believe the Doctor and Jo's story that someone is deliberately attempting to provoke a war between Earth and Draconia.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Frontier in Space
programme.desc: Accused of being a spy, the Doctor is sentenced to imprisonment on the Moon while Jo is taken into the custody of an old enemy.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Frontier in Space
programme.desc: The Doctor and Jo are the Master's prisoners. In a bid to escape, the Doctor makes a dangerous spacewalk.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Frontier in Space
programme.desc: On Draconia, the Doctor reveals the Master's plan to provoke war to the Draconian Emperor. But the Master escapes, taking Jo as a hostage.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Frontier in Space
programme.desc: The Doctor leads a mission to the Ogron home world to apprehend the Master and rescue Jo. But the Master is in league with some old enemies of the Doctor.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks
programme.desc: Injured by an Orgron gun, the Doctor asks the Time Lords to send the TARDIS after the Daleks. Leaving him asleep, Jo goes to explore the planet Spirodon.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor recovers from his coma and befriends a Thal expedition but is captured by the Daleks and taken to their base. Then a second Thal expedition arrives with terrible news.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks
programme.desc: In Dalek city, the Doctor breaks out of his prison cell and joins forces with the Thals. With the Daleks in pursuit, the Doctor is forced to improvise a daring escape plan.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor and the Thals escape from the Dalek city and the Doctor is delighted to find that Jo is alive. The Daleks are preparing a deadly bacteria to kill all life on the planet.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks
programme.desc: Desperate to prevent the Daleks from releasing their plague, the Doctor, Jo and the Thals infiltrate the Dalek base. But the Daleks detect the intruders!

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks
programme.desc: A force of ten thousand Daleks are coming to life below the surface of Spiridon. The Doctor and the Thals must find a way to defeat the Daleks before they invade the galaxy.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Green Death
programme.desc: In Wales, a dead miner is found glowing green. UNIT investigates and Jo empathizes with the environmentalism of Cliff Jones who is opposing the pollution from Global Chemicals.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Green Death
programme.desc: Investigating the old mine workings, Jo and the miner, Bert, become trapped beneath the surface when the lift is sabotaged. Bert touches some green slime and becomes infected.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Green Death
programme.desc: The Doctor and Jo discover the mine’s terrible secret. Global Chemicals’ managing director, Stevens is determined that they won’t live to reveal what they have learnt.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Green Death
programme.desc: The Brigadier attempts to seal the giant maggots in the mine with explosives, but this only results in the creatures burrowing to the surface.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar travels to the U.K. to help troubled dog owners with a territorial street dog and a dalmatian whose personality can turn ugly.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: British problem dogs including wild German Shepherds, a dog that must be muzzled by court order, and an English cocker spaniel that hates cars.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Problem dogs in the U.K. including two dogs that spent most of their lives in Africa, and a barking Jack Russell terrier mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar's English adventure ends with an aggressive klee kai, a collie mix that hates walks, and a hyper Labrador.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: When Susan MacDonald met Cobar, an Australian koolie dog, she thought it would be a match made in heaven, but she was wrong; a Shar-Pei mix is afraid of his own reflection.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A wheaten terrier mix is so attached to her owner that she won't leave his side; a shar-pei who is aggressive towards other dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An English Bulldog who is destroying her owner's house and aggressive towards their other dog; Howie Mandel's chihuahua is aggressive towards him and his wife.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A border collie/greyhound mix with an aversion to other dogs; a woman tries to tame her dog's nervousness; a large dog with too much energy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps Casey Anderson, of "Expedition Wild," and his wife, actress Missi Pyle, with their dogs; a pit bull's fears make him aggressive.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar joins forces with Jennifer McCarthy to examine the nature of wolf-dogs, the result of the cross-breeding of wolves and domestic dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps actress Rhona Mitra curb her bulldog's violent tendencies; a newly-wed couples Chihuahua assumes dominance over their sheltie mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: NASA astronauts Suni Williams and Leland Melvin have worked on the International Space Station, but need Cesar's help with canine problems.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A couple of German shepherd pups with a shadowy obedience track records; a rescue dog with trust issues.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Australian Shepherd behaves aggressively after being attacked by a couple of dogs; a shelter dog won't stop biting and snapping at potential owners.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere, and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail, leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The following day is Dog's birthday, but that won't stop him from chasing a fugitive, who is facing firearms charges. Dog doesn't relish the thought of going after an alleged gunslinger on his birthday, but he's never one to avoid a challenge.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth have to be at the state capitol bright and early to receive an award for their fight against ice in Hawaii. Afterwards, they're inspired to start the hunt for Shanna, an alleged ice user and identity thief with $80,000 in bonds.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth calls a client, Daphne, whose bond they have to revoke and makes a shocking discovery: Daphne's cosigner on her bond and ex-boyfriend, Bobby, has just committed suicide.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After meeting with the cosigner on a bond for a man named John, Dog and the Posse hatch a plan to lure him to a high rise apartment. But when night falls, their plan leaves a member of the team alone and in harm's way!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in. To complicate matters, this fugitive lives in a tightly-knit community, where good information won't come easy.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kolani's on the run, left his wife to look after four kids, and left Dog holding the bag for the $10k bond. So their pursuit of this case takes them into some parts of Oahu, and the human heart, that few of us will ever see.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today the crew is hunting for Holly, a car thief. She's one of Tim's bonds, and the entire Dog crew knows that means trouble--or at least a long and difficult chase.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is tracking down Cecilia, who's wanted for car theft, but she's nowhere to be found. Her girlfriend and co-signer has gone missing too. Just when the trail goes cold, a friend leads the team to the cosigner's empty apartment.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth and the team are in Colorado, and they face a special challenge--getting the kids to camp. After the drop-off, Dog is more than ready to track down a fugitive. Robin disposed of a body after a homicide, and now he's skipped his court date.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in search of a potentially dangerous fugitive, he's only 19 and charged with kidnapping and menacing. The case takes an unexpected turn when the Chapman clan ends up in a confrontation with the suspect's family.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team are back in Colorado hunting bounties. Today's fugitive has a long rap sheet and a reputation for packing heat. With nothing but an address and phone number, the team heads out on the hunt.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kimo does a vanishing act for his day in court, and now Dog and the posse have to find him. With precious few leads to follow, Dog turns to the fugitive's on again-off-again girlfriend, but she's initially reluctant to join the hunt.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today Dog and the family are back in Colorado and are about to make one of their most exciting captures ever. When the adrenaline-fueled arrest goes down, every family member will play a critical role.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the Chapman clan start their hunt today with another well-established bail bonding family. And in fact, as Dog's fame has grown, so have his responsibilities. So in addition to tracking down two felons on the lam, Dog has to prepare for a good.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is confronted with two alleged felons who are in crisis. Family and friends of these bondees are convinced that they are getting into further trouble while awaiting trial, so Dog and the posse have to bring these men back to jail.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Christopher is barely 21, who already has a history of domestic abuse and assault, and now he's facing major time in a room without a view. This hunt won't be easy for Dog -- the leads are few, informers and family are not forthcoming.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Facing hard time for forging checks, Melissa pulled a vanishing act at her sentencing hearing, bolting from the courthouse in broad daylight. Lucky for her, bondsman Dog and his posse are in Colorado and ready to help.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant seated in the helicopter will "go" they crawl out and under the helicopter. Players transfer cow hooves out of a tank of Cod Liver Oil and into a tank of Maggots. Contestant must drive their car at approx. 25mph towards another car.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will start this game floating in the water. Contestants compress a cows eye with their mouth, squeezing the juice out of the eye into a glass. Contestant will stand on Euclid dump trucks as they travel down the road.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Players are placed into a large plexiglas coffin with several thousand snakes. Eight glass torch-goblets are placed on stone pillars of varying heights. Contestants will bob in a tank filled with cow eyes to recover pig hearts.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant must dive into the water and swim down to a city bus. On a table, there are dishes of roaches. Players are given fifty cow brains with a FF chip hidden inside. Contestants must make the way across a maze of beams.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The contestant is placed in a specially designed clear bag. A tank is filled with millipedes, roaches and worms. Contestant is standing on one of four 8-foot tall 16-foot long Plexiglas walls suspended high above the ground.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be riding in the back of a truck driving down a pier. Players will have to clear tables to uncover a three-digit combination written on the glass top of each of the tables. Contestant must drive their car under a semi truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: There will be a boat that is towing three rafts. A Plexiglas bottom covered in pig parts. The child stands under a large metal shower-head and pulls a chain. Suspended above the water. The kid must climb through the tubes and traverse.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants must leap back and forth from the boats to get as many flags. Contestant is put into a vat used for stomping on grapes to make wine. Contestant must walk the length of the truck removing flags along the way.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The contestant must slide down two cables while standing on a small platform. One at a time, contestants pick gifts from under a Christmas tree. Contestants must swim underneath a 20 foot by 40-foot Plexiglas grid that is lit on fire.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be placed on a platform floating in the water, where they will grab a skid of the helicopter. Player is chained between two poles and covered with bees. Contestants will be seated in the front of a car suspended over the water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be contected to a dune buggy by his ankles. Contestant will have to bury their spouse's head in worms using only their mouth. One person from each team will be hanging from the skids of a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be chained to either side of a platform with the contestant having one key to free them from chains. Player dunks their head into a tank and retrieves a cows heart with their mouth.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this couples stunt, partners will hang by their ankles, they will each hold onto one end of a rope and be lifted over the water. Couples will use their mouths to root around in pies made from wax worms, pigs stomach, fish sauce and duck tongue.
